orig: <FF03>What's wrong, guys?<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Ah, Maki, <FF07>!<FF03>Perfect timing!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>It seems Masao's cancelling today's<FF03>plans! Such a pity
<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Maki<FF03>Huh.? How come? I was really looking<FF03>forward to it
<FF02><FF01>   <FF1B>Mark<FF03>Nanjo, you evil
<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Reiji<FF03>Heh heh heh
<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Maki<FF03>Is he telling the truth, Masao?<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Mark<FF03>N-No way
I'm goin'!<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Maki<FF03>Yay. Chisato and the others are waiting<FF03>outside. C'mon, everyone, let's go.<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Mark<FF03>Nanjo
You guys are gonna<FF03>pay for this.<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Reiji<FF03>Heh
Looking at Maki now, what<FF03>happened before is like a bad dream!<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Heh! Pandora, eh
<FF02><FF01>   <FF1B>Reiji<FF03>Don't tell me you're still thinking<FF03>about all that!<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Oh, it's nothing! I only just remembered<FF03>the last thing in Pandora's box

<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Well then, <FF07>, shall we go?<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Reiji<FF03>Hey, what did you mean by that?<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Maki's voice<FF03>Hurry up, <FF07>.<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Mark<FF03>Hey, looks like Mr! Smellypants<FF03>is here!<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Brown<FF03>Heheh

Laugh it up, chump! Today's<FF03>the last day you get to call me that.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Brown<FF03>You're not too fond of heights, are you,<FF03>Massy? Or should I say, Mr! Dampcrotch?<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Mark<FF03>What the--Who told you that, you<FF03>bastard.?<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Brown<FF03>Mwahaha
Your mom gave me every last<FF03>detail.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Brown<FF03>My, my, how shameful for a sixth-<FF03>grader

<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Mark<FF03>That stupid cow.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Mark<FF03>Can it, okay? It's better than crapping<FF03>your pants in junior high.<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Brown<FF03>Well technically, sixth grade's part<FF03>of junior high, too
Heheheh!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Brown<FF03>I'm gonna get a good look at a return<FF03>performance by Mr! Dampcrotch today.<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Those nitwits
Where do they think<FF03>they are.? Ugh, they give me a headache!<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Maki<FF03>Sorry to keep you waiting. Huh

<FF03>What's wrong, guys?<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Brown<FF03><FF08>. Maki. Perfect timing!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Brown<FF03>Mark here wanted to tell you how<FF03>excited he is to ride the freefall.<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Maki<FF03>Ooh, really? Then let's get going.<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Mark<FF03>Hidehiko, you dick
<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Brown<FF03>Heeheehee
<FF02><FF01>   <FF1B>Maki<FF03>What's wrong? C'mon, let's go. Chisato<FF03>and the others are waiting outside.<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Mark<FF03>Hidehiko
I'll get you.<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Brown<FF03>Man, I can't wait to see this!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Brown<FF03>But check out Maki
Makes the stuff<FF03>that happened seem like a bad dream!<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Heh! Pandora, eh
<FF02><FF01>   <FF1B>Brown<FF03>Sorry, what?<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Brown<FF03>Man, you're bringing that up now?<FF03>Cruel as ever, huh
